bets.title: Will He Finish?
bets.description: Will Sammy complete all 690 laps without quitting?

bets.title: Will He Finish in Under 7 Hours?
bets.description: Will he complete the marathon in under 7 hours total time?

bets.title: How Many Breaks Will He Take?
bets.description: Each bar = a guessed number of breaks. Height = how many people guessed it.

bets.title: How Many Times Will He Yak?
bets.description: Each bar = a guessed number of yaks. Height = how many people guessed it.
